interface.longDescription: Tanaab-based canon enforcement as a Codex plugin, including installable skills plus a stub MCP registry for future canon resources.
defaultPrompt: Use $tanaab-javascript-author to add Bun tests for utility functions in utils/.
Use $tanaab-javascript-repo-standardizer to standardize formatting, structure, and baseline scripts for this repo.
Use $tanaab-changelog-author to draft the next CHANGELOG.md release notes.
Use $tanaab-skill-author to create a skill for sending AgentMail email through cURL.
Use $tanaab-javascript-cli-author to build a Bun CLI that lists open PRs for tanaabased/canon.
Use $tanaab-github-release-author to prepare a GitHub Release draft from CHANGELOG.md entries.
Use $tanaab-github-workflow-author to create a Tanaab-approved GitHub Actions release workflow.
